docs.title: Welcome to the Knowledge Atlas
docs.text:
Select a textbook below to begin your journey.

- :octicons-beaker-24: **Biology** --- Explore the science of life, from cells to ecosystems. [:octicons-arrow-right-24: Start Reading](biology/index.md) - :octicons-rocket-24: **Physics** --- Master the laws of the universe, motion, and energy. [:octicons-arrow-right-24: Start Reading](physics/index.md) - :octicons-people-24: **The Team** --- Learn more about the educators behind these resources.
